title: Black Virus Strain (黑色毒株)
description: A kind of horror virus which attacks people. Now, here they come...
body:
# Introdution

One night, while wandering on the plain, some villagers discovered this strain of virus on some plants. One of them did not find any problems after coming into contact with it and believed that the strain did not pose a significant threat. But over time, the villagers discovered that this strain of virus can gradually make humans lose themselves on a spiritual level, until they completely fall into madness. The whereabouts of the villager who has fallen into madness are still unknown ...

Perhaps as long as this power is used correctly, it can coexist with this strain.

Choose your favorite race, join them, and fight against the black virus together!

5 kinds of race available now!

1.Merfolk
2.Ghast
3.Blaze
4.Enderman
5.Black Strain


## Screenshots


![ability of ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8456d2223bdcda7a5ea5e817f6110f4b701ec99.jpeg)

![fight against with them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da7bbfdc7acb70e9675c54d74b3beb4786f0ccbf.jpeg)

## Features
1.New blocks

2.New race

3.New tools

4.New biome

5.New potions

6.New items
